TestCase z8Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_data1 = (double*)malloc(t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_data1, t1.data1, t1.n1 * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.data1 = follow_case_data1;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive code to ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n1 < 1) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Operation: decrement a random element by 0.5 when the element > minimum double
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n1;
    if (follow_case.data1[idx] > std::numeric_limits<double>::lowest()) {
        follow_case.data1[idx] -= 0.5;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
